title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Hopscotch - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Hopscotch - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Hopscotch. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Digital Marketing Manager to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Hopscotch:
Hopscotch is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hopscotch!
